top_signals.title: OptinMonster WordPress plugin hacked in CDN supply-chain attack
top_signals.summary: WordPress plugins OptinMonster, TrustPulse, and PushEngage have been compromised in a supply-chain attack impacting Awesome Motive-s content distribution network (CDN). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Another 10 crested ibises released in Ishikawa Prefecture
top_signals.summary: This brought the number of crested ibises, a special natural treasure of Japan, set free in Honshu to 18.
